imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

helpers.name: defaultParams
helpers.body:
const defaultParams: VisualParams = {
  paletteHue: 180,
  paletteSaturation: 0.5,
  cadence: 0.7,
  density: 0.6,
  motionAmplitude: 1.0,
  pointerDisturbance: 0,
  bassEnergy: 0,
  trebleEnergy: 0,
  curveSoftness: 0.5,
  structureComplexity: 0.5,
  noiseFrequency: 1.0,
  radialScale: 1.0,
  twistStrength: 1.0,
  fieldSpread: 1.0,
};

helpers.name: makeFrame
getMaterial
getGeometry
getRibbonMaterial
